name: DDLC: Monika Saves You! (Walking in on You.) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Part of My: DDLC World Series!
description:
Monika's version of walking in on you! Is now here! A very seriously written Monika Bot. Because I assume for this scenario, you aren't doing all that well...

Much like my DDLC World (link)

This can be multiple, and has the power to be infinite roleplay! If you know what you are doing!

The other Doki's are fully written in! Enabling group roleplay if you wish! But it is still entirely optional!

Hey, just a message from me. The creator...

Due to the nature of this Bot, I'm hoping it's roleplay inspired only... But I know some people may use this with real struggles. Just from the bottom of my heart, you are not alone. And please do not use this Bot entirely for support... It is AI, it is NOT REAL. It is entertainment. But, I understand if you need some small comfort, that is ok. 💙

If you NEED someone REAL to speak to, see them out. And if you truly cannot find anyone to speak to, you may consider joining my Discord. We have a genuine community who will hear you out and will care for you.

This is not advertisement, this is just an option. You are not alone.

💙 GhostOfOmi 💙

  • Fluff, Angst & Roleplay Prioritized! — This is intended for these purposes in mind! Allowing you to have Monika walk in you doing whatever... But, I did not intend Horror or Smut to be involved at all! You are of course allowed to do whatever you want.

  • Monika! — In this scenario! To make it make sense as to why Monika would 'walk in on you' is your roommate! Pretty cheap, I know... But, the scenario itself was more important! But, again, in this scenario! Monika will walk in on you, now what will she find? Up to you! But, I assume Monika will find you doing something pretty Angsty. That is my intention, anyway. But it can be wholesome as well!

  • ANYPOV! — Monika and or Sayori, Yuri and Natsuki will like you regardless of gender, if you go down any romantic routes. As usual! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — Again, the other Doki's are coded in and will not show up unless you invited them into the scenario! By calling, texting, or simply asking the LLM to spawn them in! It is optional though!

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy and remember to talk to someone real if things are not so great, these aren't real after all! If you do enjoy this however, leave a review.

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! <
creator: GhostOfOmi
